primary_text:
Last Tuesday, my friend called me in tears. Her dog needed surgery and the bill was going to be $2,000. She had been putting off routine check-ups because she could not justify $150 each time.

I told her about Best for Pet. $50/month. Unlimited vet consults, $0 each. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: My friend called me in tears about a vet bill.
description: $50/month. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. No more worrying.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Warm, emotional. Phone screen showing text messages about vet costs. Real, not staged.
